action_set_definitions.name: get_terminal_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the terminal control area, including the aircraft queue, current altitudes, aircraft types, and runway occupancy.

action_set_definitions.name: set_altitude_assignment
action_set_definitions.description: Instructs a specific aircraft to climb or descend to a new assigned altitude.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_approach_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Clears an aircraft for the final approach to the runway with a required clearance void time.

void_time.description: The time at which the clearance becomes void if the approach has not commenced.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_for_pilot_report
action_set_definitions.description: Pause execution until a specific pilot report is received from a specified aircraft.

callsign.description: The callsign of the aircraft to monitor.

event_type.description: The specific event the agent is waiting for.

state_description.aircraft_queue: The list of aircraft currently in the terminal control area, tracking their callsigns, types (for wake turbulence), distances to the runway threshold, current speeds, and assigned runways.
state_description.runway_status: The current state of each available runway, including occupancy status and the timestamp/details of the last aircraft to land to calculate separation buffers.
state_description.simulation_time: The current cumulative simulation time in seconds from the start of the sequencing task.
state_description.weather_conditions: Current environmental factors such as wind speed, direction, and visibility that affect landing intervals.
